# OpenPay

> OpenPay is a Web3 digital wallet powered by Pi cryptocurrency, designed to make Pi simple, stable, and spendable in everyday life.

## Pages

- [Home](/): OpenPay overview and entry point.
- [About OpenPay](/about-openpay): What OpenPay is and what it supports.
- [Whitepaper](/whitepaper): Technical and product whitepaper.
- [User Guide](/openpay-guide): How to use OpenPay features.
- [Regulatory Status](/regulatory-status): Regulatory positioning of OpenPay.

## Optional

- [Terms](/terms): Terms of service.
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy): Privacy policy.
- [Legal](/legal): Legal notices.
- [GDPR](/gdpr): GDPR information.
